creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Reproducible here. 

Whilst there's no response to character keystrokes (alphanumeric and the like), the UI that appears in response to Control-F _does_ disappear in response to the Escape key. 

<https://github.com/orbitalquark/textadept/issues> at a glance, I don't see anything matching upstream. 


% pkg info -x textadept
textadept-11.4
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #29 main-n260055-8bce8d28abe6: Sat Jan 14 02:48:34 GMT 2023     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400078 1400078
% pkg -vv | grep -e url -e enabled -e priority
    url             : "http://pkg0.bme.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:14:amd64/latest",
    enabled         : yes,
    priority        : 4,
    url             : "https://alpha.pkgbase.live/current/FreeBSD:14:amd64/latest",
    enabled         : no,
    priority        : 0,
    url             : "file:///usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/main-default",
    enabled         : yes,
    priority        : 3
%
